name: heyhomex-load-testing
description: HeyHomex load testing project using k6 and TypeScript

scripts.build: npm run build:buyer && npm run build:register-users
scripts.test:smoke: npm run build:buyer && k6 run -e PROFILE=smoke dist/buyer-smoke-flow.js
scripts.test:load: npm run build:buyer && k6 run -e PROFILE=load dist/buyer-smoke-flow.js
scripts.test:stress: npm run build:buyer && k6 run -e PROFILE=stress dist/buyer-smoke-flow.js
scripts.test:register-users: npm run build:register-users && k6 run dist/register-users-from-csv.js
